title: Progress
totalLearntDesc: Total unique words in your portfolio
difficultDesc: Words seen often but not yet learned
dueTodayHelp: Words that need to be reviewed right now according to our memory algorithm (SRS). These are the words you're most likely to forget.
totalLearntHelp: The total number of unique words you have started learning and are currently in your SRS cycle.
totalStudiedHelp: Shows how often you practice words. Practicing a word multiple times increases this number.
difficultHelp: Words you've seen many times (5+) but haven't quite learned yet. These might need extra attention.
